'''madhodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loanshark|loanshark]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loanshark|loanshark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| madhodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædhedeth|mædhedeth]] || [[word:mædhedej|mædhedej]] || [[word:mædhedesh|mædhedesh]] || [[word:mædhede|mædhede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madhodhodoth|madhodhodoth]] || [[word:madhodhodoj|madhodhodoj]] || [[word:madhodhodosh|madhodhodosh]] || [[word:madhodhodo|madhodhodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madhodoth|madhodoth]] || [[word:madhodoj|madhodoj]] || [[word:madhodosh|madhodosh]] || [[word:madhodo|madhodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madhofdoth|madhofdoth]] || [[word:madhofdoj|madhofdoj]] || [[word:madhofdosh|madhofdosh]] || [[word:madhofdof|madhofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madhodotho|madhodotho]] || [[word:madhodojo|madhodojo]] || [[word:madhodosho|madhodosho]] || [[word:madhodoko|madhodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madhodoth|madhodoth]] || [[word:madhodoj|madhodoj]] || [[word:madhodosh|madhodosh]] || [[word:madhodo|madhodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madhodothol|madhodothol]] || [[word:madhodojol|madhodojol]] || [[word:madhodoshol|madhodoshol]] || [[word:madhodokol|madhodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madhodothotho|madhodothotho]] || [[word:madhodojojo|madhodojojo]] || [[word:madhodoshosho|madhodoshosho]] || [[word:madhodoko|madhodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madhodothon|madhodothon]] || [[word:madhodojon|madhodojon]] || [[word:madhodoshon|madhodoshon]] || [[word:madhodokon|madhodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madhodothoro|madhodothoro]] || [[word:madhodojoro|madhodojoro]] || [[word:madhodoshoro|madhodoshoro]] || [[word:madhodokoro|madhodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
